meta.question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

results.input_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?

decomposed_queries: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Ipilimumab'?
Which trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall > 21?

retrieval_trace.decomposed_query: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Ipilimumab'?

retrieval_by_decomposition.decomposed_query: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Ipilimumab'?

candidate.question: What trials have Name of ICI equal to 'Ipilimumab'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
candidate.parent_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?

candidate.question: Trials where 'Name of ICI' is 'Ipilimumab'.
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Ipilimumab for Hodgkin Lymphoma used Chemo/Anti-EGFR as the control?

candidate.question: Trials where the Name of ICI is 'Ipilimumab'.
candidate.sql: SELECT "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for pancreatic cancer evaluated Ipilimumab in phase 2, and what are the trial names and original publications?

candidate.question: What trials have Cancer type equal to 'Melanoma'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';
candidate.parent_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type Melanoma?

candidate.question: What trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall > 21?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
